div1.entryFree:
Commend, subst., 1) recommendation: better than his outward show can any way speak in his just c. Per. II, 2, 49.
2) compliment, greeting: besides --s and courteous breath, Merch. II, 9, 90. I send to her my kind --s, R2 III, 1, 38. speak to his gentle hearing kind --s, III, 3, 126.
